title: Easily open item in board from "context view" in My Work
excerpt: In the My Work table, with compact (default) item view, if you click an item’s board link in the “board” column, the board will open with the selected item highlighted and open. It opens a URL with the pulse id specified…

posts.author: kmiller (katie)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the My Work table, with compact (default) item view, if you click an item’s board link in the “board” column, the board will open with the selected item highlighted and open. It opens a URL with the pulse id specified.
In the new context view, clicking on the name of a board above an item opens the board, but without the item selected.

My team would appreciate if there was an easy way to navigate to an item’s board WITH the item open/selected in My Work context view like we can in the compact view.

posts.author: shayan.moussawi (Shayan Moussawi)
posts.cookedHtml: I second this - this shouldn’t just be a MyWork functionality though- in general jumping to a Board with an item pre selected would be super useful
